changelog: Added support for Swapped Exits logic
Using 'Show All Levels' now assumes you have access to a level with Yoshi
Tweaked text for bonus block checks to clarify that you need 30 coins to get them
Fixed Donut Plains 1 secret exit Yoshi logic
Fixed Donut Plains 2 secret exit Yoshi logic
Added a README that explains all the settings
Added a versions_url for automatic updates
Fixed Valley of Bowser 4 extra logic
Fixed Valley Ghost House extra logic
First major version the Spicy Mycena Waffles version of the tracker
All settings moved to a new settings window that is accessible via the top menu bar in PopTracker
